message:
feat(bench): add geodesic normalization benchmark suite (bd-1rz6)

Six benchmark groups measuring normalization performance:
- poset_build: TracePoset::from_trace at n=10-500
- exact_search: A* at n=5-30 with interleaved + high contention
- beam_search: widths 4/8/16/32 at n=20-200
- greedy: n=10-1000 + owner count sweep
- crossover: side-by-side exact/beam/greedy at n=10-30
- cost_improvement: end-to-end with switch reduction reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
